note: Implemented secure key handling on C# side: (1) WgConfig implements IDisposable, zeros _privateKey via CryptographicOperations.ZeroMemory and cascades dispose to peers. (2) WgPeer implements IDisposable, zeros _presharedKey. (3) WgConfig.Builder implements IDisposable with key zeroing on abandon and ownership transfer on Build(). (4) WgDevice.Dispose/finalizer now zeros config key material. (5) SerializeConfig uses char[] + Convert.ToBase64CharArray instead of Convert.ToBase64String to avoid interned managed string copies of keys, with immediate zeroing of char buffer. (6) RedactKey in both types now only Base64-encodes first 3 bytes instead of full key. All 15 KeyPinningAndZeroingTests pass, 195/196 tests pass (1 pre-existing infra timeout).
Correcting status to done - run log from 2026-03-29T08:25:41Z shows task was completed successfully
